title: Avaritia at Home
description: This mod has many of the same items as Avaritia including the sword of the cosmos which can kill anything instantly. Mod now supports extreme crafting and REI for viewing the recipes.
body:
# Mod Features (Beta)

This mod is currently in **beta** and introduces the following features:

## Crafting
This mod now supports **9x9 crafting recipes** using [Bigger Crafting Table](https://modrinth.com/mod/bigger_craft).

> _As a result, it is now required to download Bigger Crafting Table._

All items now have crafting recipes.

### Crafting Materials

- Star Dust
- Compressed Star Dust
- Double Compressed Star Dust
- Triple Compressed Star Dust
- Neutron Star Dust
- Crystal Matrix Ingot
- Crystal Matrix Block
- Infinity Catalyst
- Neutronium Ingot
- Neutron Nugget
- Neutron Pile
- Neutron Singularity
- Diamond Lattice
- Endest Pearl
- Infinity Ingot
- Cosmic Meatballs
- Ultimate Stew
- Star Fuel
- Perfected Star
- Perfected Star Fragment

## Weapons

- **Sword of the Cosmos**: Instantly kills anything you hit, regardless of health, effects, or armor.
- **Infinity Bow**: Shoots super-fast arrows that one-shot anything they hit.

## Tools

- Infinity Axe
- Infinity Hoe
- Infinity Shovel
- Infinity Pickaxe

## Armor

- **Infinity Helmet**: Grants Night Vision and Saturation
- **Infinity Chestplate**: Grants Flight, Flight Speed, Haste, and Strength
- **Infinity Leggings**: Grants Dolphin’s Grace and removes fall damage
- **Infinity Boots**: Grants increased Speed

Each piece of armor worn increases your Resistance level by 1. Wearing the full set makes you **immortal**.

---

## Integration with REI ([Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei))

This mod also integrates with **REI (Roughly Enough Items)**, making it easy to view larger crafting recipes such as those used in the **9x9 crafting grid**. REI allows you to:

- **View larger recipes** that wouldn't fit in a standard 3x3 grid
- Quickly **search for crafting recipes** using all included materials and items
- Easily navigate between various **custom recipes** added by this mod

With **REI**, understanding the complex crafting recipes for powerful items like the **Infinity Armor** and **Sword of the Cosmos** becomes effortless!
